subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-09 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: I have written in many Tablets that the friends must speak in the meetings... We must encourage the believers in public-speaking and especially encourage those who can do so.
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @The Holy Spirit, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech
